recommendations.title: My Fake Boyfriend
recommendations.overview: A young man in a tricky situation follows the advice of his unconventional best friend and uses social media to create a fake boyfriend to keep his awful ex-lover out of his life. But everything backfires when he meets the real love of his life, and

recommendations.title: The Devil's Mark
recommendations.overview: An exorcist priest meets a family that has a daughter who is pursued by a demon.

recommendations.title: Fyre Fraud
recommendations.overview: A true-crime comedy exploring a failed music festival turned internet meme at the nexus of social media influence, late-stage capitalism, and morality in the post-truth era.

recommendations.title: Follow Me
recommendations.overview: A social media personality travels with his friends to Moscow to capture new content for his successful vlog. Always pushing the limits and catering to a growing audience, they enter a cold world of mystery, excess, and danger. When the lines between

recommendations.title: The Mangler
recommendations.overview: A laundry-folding machine has been possessed by a demon, causing it to develop homicidal tendencies.

recommendations.title: The Antichrist
recommendations.overview: An Italian nobleman seeks help after his paralyzed daughter becomes possessed by the spirit of a malevolent ancestress.

recommendations.title: Bad Milo!
recommendations.overview: A horror comedy centered on a guy who learns that his unusual stomach problems are being caused by a demon living in his intestines.

recommendations.title: Influencer
recommendations.overview: While struggling on a solo backpacking trip in Thailand, social media influencer Madison meets CW, who travels with ease and shows her a more uninhibited way of living. But CW's interest in her takes a darker turn.

recommendations.title: Feed
recommendations.overview: A group of social media experts are hired to help an old family business to strive. But they soon find themselves stuck on a tiny island in a lake in which an ancient Swedish witch is said to live.

recommendations.title: Demon
recommendations.overview: A bridegroom is possessed by an unquiet spirit in the midst of his own wedding celebration, in this clever take on the Jewish legend of the dybbuk.
